name: Hawaiian Bread- 1 Pound Loaf
recipeIngredient: 3 tablespoons dried papaya or mango, finely chopped
3 tablespoons unsalted macadamia, walnut, or almonds, finely chop
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients except coconut, fruit, and nuts in the inner pan in the order listed (or reverse order depending on your machine).
2. Select the fruit and nut setting or the equivalent setting for your machine.
3. Add the rest of the ingredients just before the second kneading is finished, or when your machine beeps (if you used the fruit and nut setting, it's typically called a specialty bread setting).
